productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Unisex Black Duffle Bag
description: Getting away from stress and work is a breeze in this stylish, roomy overnight bag from United Colours Of Benetton. Head out anywhere and enjoy that day off work!Length 47 cmsWidth  23 cmsHeight 33 cmsMade of 55% cotton, 40% nylon and 5% polyurethane on the outside, 100% cotton on the insideOne main chamber with a zipper and sliderOrganiser sleeves with velcro for essentialsSub chamber on the front with a zipper and sliderLeather handle designSynthetic woven tape on the mouth and sides for durabilityStitch detailing for enhanced durabilityTwo insert pockets at the back with push buttonsRemovable base padding insideBrand name appliqued on the sub chamberCareonly hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringLine dryDo not iron
